title: Executive Order 5890—Partial Revocation of Withdrawal of Public Lands, California
text:
It is hereby ordered that Executive Order No. 4652, dated May 18, 1927, withdrawing certain lands in California and Nevada for use by the Department of Commerce as air-mail beacon sites and landing fields, is hereby revoked in so far as it affects the NW. ¼ sec. 20, T. 9 N., R. 2 W., San Bernardino meridian, California.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
July 16, 1932.
